## mergeLimiterConfigs

<GenerationInfo sourceFile="packages/ratelimit/src/utils/config.ts" sourceLine="38" packageName="@commandkit/ratelimit" />

Merge limiter configs; later values override earlier ones for layering.

```ts title="Signature"
function mergeLimiterConfigs(configs: Array<RateLimitLimiterConfig | undefined>): RateLimitLimiterConfig
```
